The [[MerrWeapons]] '''Superior Boarding Armor''' was a simplified version of spacetrooper [[Armor/Legends|armor]], yet still adequate for most boarding operations. It was self-repairing and capable of up to 24 [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] continuous use. It had a propulsion system powered by a [[Missile/Legends|rocket]]. If this ran out, [[Gunman]] discovered that it was possible to vent some air through the rockets to provide some momentum, although the user had to be careful not to deplete their air supply too much.

Suits sold for around 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
